BORDERLINE.action: Dispatch inspection team to check water tank pressure and flow rate.

DANGER.action: Immediate dispatch to isolate city water pump to prevent neighborhood flooding.

BORDERLINE.action: Investigate potential waste cluster congestion to prevent localized overflow.

DANGER.action: Dispatch heavy clearance crew to clear critical waste blockage at central sorting facility.

NORMAL.action: Standard operation of pneumatic waste collection tubes.

BORDERLINE.action: Check vacuum pressure in municipal waste tubes; possible minor leak.

DANGER.action: Critical pressure failure in waste compressor. Evacuate immediate zone and seal system.

DEFAULT.action: General operations dispatch to assess unknown anomaly.
